title: gymnogramma arifolia
intro: Gymnogramma arifolia, also known as Gymnogramma, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its sprawling habit and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma arifolia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a topical application for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Gymnogramma arifolia is often used in the form of tea, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy as a medicinal plant.
